---
title: "Kazuya Masuda"
pagetitle: "Kazuya Masuda"
---

I am an Associate Professor of Economics at [Gakushuin University](https://www.gakushuin.ac.jp/univ/eco/).

My research interests are in **development economics**, **health economics**, **economic history**, and **intergenerational mobility**.

You can reach me at [kazuya.masuda@gakushuin.ac.jp](mailto:kazuya.masuda@gakushuin.ac.jp).

---

### Affiliation

Department of Economics
Gakushuin University
1-5-1 Mejiro, Toshima-ku
Tokyo 171-8588, Japan
